master_row.title: Stress-Energy Tensor
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Emergence Criterion] Classical geometric description becomes valid when: \begin{equation} \frac{\int_{-\infty}^t \langle T_{\mu\nu}(\tau)\rangle e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau}{\sqrt{\int_{-\infty}^t \langle \Delta T_{\mu\nu}^2(\tau)\rangle e^{-2(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau}} > \mathcal{N}_{\text{crit}} \end{equation} where $\mathcal{N}_{\text{crit}} \sim (m_{\text{Planck}}/m_{\text{system}})^{1/2}$. \end{theorem}
master_row.canonical_equation: \begin{equation} \frac{\int_{-\infty}^t \langle T_{\mu\nu}(\tau)\rangle e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau}{\sqrt{\int_{-\infty}^t \langle \Delta T_{\mu\nu}^2(\tau)\rangle e^{-2(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau}} > \mathcal{N}_{\text{crit}} \end{equation}
master_row.formation_inputs: μ, ν, τ, Δ, T_, N
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Emergence of Classical Spacetime’.
